languages.text: {n}На некоторых лицах среди сопровождающих вас написана смесь презрения, ярости и чистого удовольствия. Втоптать в грязь реликвию, которой касался Владыка Человечества для кое-кого — акт чистейшей ненависти.{/n}
{n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На некоторых лицах среди сопровождающих вас написана смесь презрения, ярости и чистого удовольствия. Втоптать в грязь реликвию, которой касался Владыка Человечества для кое-кого — акт чистейшей ненависти.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}
{n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}
{n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

languages.text: {n}仲間の中には、蔑みと怒り、そして純粋な快楽が混ざった表情をしている者もいる。人類のマスターに触れた遺物を汚すことは、彼らにとって純粋な憎悪の行為である。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}仲間の中には、蔑みと怒り、そして純粋な快楽が混ざった表情をしている者もいる。人類のマスターに触れた遺物を汚すことは、彼らにとって純粋な憎悪の行為である。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus compañeros muestran una mezcla de desprecio, furia y placer incontenible en sus rostros. Mancillar una reliquia tocada por el Señor de la Humanidad es, para algunos, un acto de odio puro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus compañeros muestran una mezcla de desprecio, furia y placer incontenible en sus rostros. Mancillar una reliquia tocada por el Señor de la Humanidad es, para algunos, un acto de odio puro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Von den Gesichtern deine Gefährten lassen sich Verachtung, Wut und unverfälschte Freude ablesen. Ein vom Herrn der Menschheit berührtes Relikt zu besudeln, zeugt für einige von ihnen von bloßem Hass.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Von den Gesichtern deine Gefährten lassen sich Verachtung, Wut und unverfälschte Freude ablesen. Ein vom Herrn der Menschheit berührtes Relikt zu besudeln, zeugt für einige von ihnen von bloßem Hass.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous lisez un astucieux mélange de dédain, de rage et de plaisir sur le visage d'une partie de votre entourage. Pour certains, souiller une relique issue de la main du Maître de l'Humanité est une manière inédite d'assouvir leurs pulsions de haine les plus pures.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous lisez un astucieux mélange de dédain, de rage et de plaisir sur le visage d'une partie de votre entourage. Pour certains, souiller une relique issue de la main du Maître de l'Humanité est une manière inédite d'assouvir leurs pulsions de haine les plus pures.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的一些同伴脸上混杂着轻蔑、愤怒与不加掩饰的愉悦。对某些人而言，玷污一件被人类之主触碰过的圣物，是一种纯粹的仇恨宣泄。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的一些同伴脸上混杂着轻蔑、愤怒与不加掩饰的愉悦。对某些人而言，玷污一件被人类之主触碰过的圣物，是一种纯粹的仇恨宣泄。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yoldaşlarından bazılarının yüzlerinde küçümseme, öfke ve katıksız zevk karışımı bir ifade beliriyor. İnsanlığın Efendisi'nin dokunduğu bir yadigârı kirletmek, kimisince saf bir nefret eylemi olarak görülüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Some of your companions have a mixture of contempt, rage, and unadulterated pleasure on their faces. To besmirch a relic touched by the Master of Mankind is, for some, an act of pure hatred.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yoldaşlarından bazılarının yüzlerinde küçümseme, öfke ve katıksız zevk karışımı bir ifade beliriyor. İnsanlığın Efendisi'nin dokunduğu bir yadigârı kirletmek, kimisince saf bir nefret eylemi olarak görülüyor.{/n}
